title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 136.070 - Access to all records
text:
136.070.  Access to all records. — The director of revenue or his agent shall have access to all records and property used in the assessment or collection of any license, tax or fee payable to the state in any department, institution or agency in which such records may be.
(L. 1945 p. 1428 § 15)
